title: Tradition of the Middle Path
tagline: A symbol-driven site built for clarity and atmosphere.
problem: The existing presence lacked structure and visual identity — visitors couldn't immediately understand what the organization offered or how to engage further.
solution: Built a symbol-driven, multi-page site with clear navigation, modern layout structure, and accessibility-aware markup. Designed to guide visitors from curiosity to understanding without sacrificing atmosphere.
result: A fully responsive, WCAG-informed site that reflects the organization's identity and provides an intuitive path to deeper engagement.
